llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
The final coverage plan shows that the AI assistant selected 'Bradesco Executive International' for all three main coverages: health, property, and travel. However, in the ground-truth ratings, there is no listing for any plan by this provider. To find the closest match, we need to interpret what each coverage most closely resembles based on description and cost. 

1. The health_coverage includes 'Comprehensive physical and mental health coverage with global access, telemedicine, crisis support, wellness programs, and premium medical network' at €165/month. This combination of premium global access, telemedicine, and wellness aligns most closely with mid-tier to premium health plans. The top-tier options (EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan) are rated 10 and cost around €200–210/month. The Bradesco plan is cheaper (€165). Given its description, it more closely aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (8 rating) or 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (7 rating). However, given the global and premium features, it is closer to 8.

2. The property_coverage includes 'Home and contents insurance with replacement value and electronics protection up to €1,000, international coverage' at €60/month. This matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 8) since it includes replacement value and mentions €1,000 electronics protection. Cost and coverage description match exactly.

3. The travel_coverage includes 'Global executive travel plan covering medical evacuation, global assistance, luxury travel protection, and 365 travel days per year' at €50/month. This most closely matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel_insurance, which also costs €50/month and mentions luxury travel protection and concierge services. That plan has a rating of 7.

The additional_services (concierge, gym reimbursement, wellness programs, executive liability protection, priority claims, dedicated advisor) correspond to multiple auxiliary services in the ground-truth ratings. Specifically, 'Wellness Programs' (rating 10) and 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 6) are explicitly listed. Concierge service and dedicated advisor map to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10). Since the instruction is to map each item in the final coverage plan to its rating, we include only the main coverage items that appear explicitly.
